title: Operations
description: Use this area for maintenance, review loops, cleanup, privacy boundaries, and system reliability.
focus: Keep the system lean, privacy-safe, and easy to restart after time away.
prompts: Based on 20_Areas/Operations, DASHBOARD.md, and 99_System/Guides/WORKFLOW.md, identify the main maintenance bottleneck and propose a cleanup pass.
Audit the current starter for link drift, stale entrypoints, and public-template violations.
Turn the latest maintenance changes into a short system-log update.
checkpoints: Inbox does not grow without review.
Control-layer files still agree on the same operating model.
The public template contains no private instance data.

nextActions.text: Run one privacy or drift check.
Log the maintenance change if the system itself changed.
